title: Graph amendment record (Bounded Graph Amendments)
description: One append-only record per Phase-6 graph amendment, stored as amendments/A<NN>.json. The amended graph.json stays the authoritative DAG; this record is the provenance + the input to the validator's I17/I18/I19 offline checks. Records are never edited or deleted. NOTE: the human-gate policy (scope_change==true => human_gate==true; kind==cancel_unit => human_gate==true) is enforced by validate_run.py's I19 (state-machine.md §3.6), NOT by this schema's allOf — so an ungated cancel/scope-change reaches I19 and fails there with the I19 label (a schema-invalid record would be dropped before I19 runs). This schema keeps only the STRUCTURAL conditionals below (dod_refs presence for add/split; split shape).

fuel_before.description: Fuel remaining BEFORE this amendment. WP2 tamper-evidence: validate_run.py I18 chains A01.fuel_before == expansion.fuel_initial, A(k+1).fuel_before == A(k).fuel_after.

fuel_after.description: Fuel remaining AFTER this amendment. WP2: I18 requires fuel_after == fuel_before − fuel_cost, and the last record's fuel_after == expansion.fuel_remaining.

retired_snapshot.description: Verbatim copies of each retired unit object from the pre-amendment graph.json (I19 reads tags + acceptance_criteria from here).

criteria_map.description: split_unit only: parent acceptance criterion (verbatim key) -> child unit id(s) now covering it.

allOf.$comment: add_units/split_unit carry a non-empty dod_refs tracing to definition_of_done, and add >=1 unit.
WP3 kind closure — add_units: >=1 added, NO retirement (a pure addition).
WP3 kind closure — split_unit: >=2 children, EXACTLY 1 retired, a non-empty snapshot with id/tags/acceptance_criteria per item, and a criteria_map.

items.$comment: WP-A/B1: pin inner types so a schema-VALID-but-wrong-shape snapshot (e.g. tags:7) can no longer reach validate_run.py's I19 set()/list ops and crash it — the mini backend evaluates these nested item properties too.

allOf.$comment: WP3 kind closure — add_edges: edges only, NO unit add/retire/snapshot.
WP3 kind closure — cancel_unit: >=1 retired, NO adds.
